baseline_reference.chain: R_P_source_audit_pixel_certificate -> build_paper_d10 -> source_transport_pair -> strict_branch_two_law_evaluation -> clock display

landing_criterion: MW inside 80.3692 +- 0.0133 GeV AND MZ inside 91.1880 +- 0.0020 GeV simultaneously (one-sigma bands of the ledger targets)
interpretation_rule: a landing entry is a candidate repair whose menu selection is counted; it does not close CL-5 by itself and becomes a preregistered revision awaiting independent confirmation as the next frozen test; if nothing lands the suspect list is exhausted at one loop and CL-5 resolution moves to structure this menu does not contain
no_continuous_tuning: every axis below is discrete and closed; no continuous parameter is scanned

R1_gauge_one_loop_coefficients.suspect: frozen MSSM one-loop triple in the D10 gauge closure

values.rationale: the papers state the SM values fail; the declared SM triple already exists in the same module as B_SM_ALPHA_GUT (line 35); recording that failure quantitatively is part of the result, including the case where the alpha_U pixel solve loses its bracket entirely

R2_beta_EW_transmutation_exponent.suspect: beta_EW = N_c + 1 in v = E_cell exp(-2 pi / (beta_EW alpha_U))
R2_beta_EW_transmutation_exponent.code_site: beta_ew(n_c) = n_c + 1 (line 93-94) and v_from_transmutation (line 97-99); n_c enters the chain only through this exponent

R3_value_law_branch.suspect: the recorded two-way discrete value-law selection (ambiguity 9.3 MeV on MW, 5.1 MeV on MZ per COMPRESSION_SCORECARD); this axis is also the executable projection of the QT1-QT5 premise suspect, since the archived law is the exact implication of QT1-QT5 and the corpus exposes no other executable QT switch (the QT receipt fails closed on every source-entailment field)
R3_value_law_branch.code_site: code/particles/calibration/derive_wzh_residual_elimination_boundary.py strict_branch_two_law_evaluation; both laws are emitted by the same evaluator on every basis

values.rationale: archived J10-rigid selector; source of the ledger (80.330, 91.119) row
running-tree value law with (tau2_tree_exact, delta_n_tree_exact) from lambda_EW = eta^2/(4 beta); the second branch of the recorded two-way selection

R4_evaluation_pixel.suspect: SL-3 working pixel provenance; the source-audit certificate P_cand carries the superseded alpha tail (CL-6 note: converged alpha^-1 = 136.994835177413 supersedes 136.994835164622 beyond digit 9)
R4_evaluation_pixel.code_site: code/particles/hierarchy/certificates/R_P_source_audit_pixel_certificate.json (P_cand) versus the CL-6 converged forward root and the public endpoint branch

values.rationale: SL-3 source-audit certificate pixel currently consumed by the lane
certified converged forward root (CL-6, precision-100 reruns)
public endpoint branch pixel recorded by the hierarchy bundle; named a relevant evaluation point
rounded legacy calibration carrier, declared module default P_DEFAULT; included because it is a declared discrete evaluation point the code exposes

R5_declared_threshold_scheme_switches.inventory_statement: complete inventory of declared switches in the D10 W/Z forward chain; nothing invented

found.description: tree Z readout MZ = v sqrt(pi (alpha2' + alphaY'))

Stage-3 delta_rho Z-only pole surrogate MZ -> MZ / sqrt(1 + 3/(32 pi^2)), declared in build_paper_d10 (m_z_pole_stage3) and carried by derive_d10_ew_observable_family.py as the stage3_pole_surrogate reporting branch; W unchanged

excluded.reason: exists in the legacy module for the D11 Yukawa lane only and requires a continuous mu_sync choice; excluded under the no-continuous-tuning rule
fixed declared display adapter (R_gamma_noG_DAG_certificate); the ledger row numbers are already on this display and the CL-5 suspect list does not name the clock

menu_construction: full factorial product of the five discrete axes: 2 (R1) x 3 (R2) x 4 (R4) x 2 (R3) x 2 (R5) = 96 entries; this contains the baseline, every single-axis revision, and every pairwise combination the code can evaluate; entries whose chain fails to solve (bracket loss) are recorded as failures with the exception text
exhaustiveness_statement: the menu is exhaustive relative to the CL-5 suspect list (frozen MSSM one-loop coefficients, premises QT1-QT5 via their sole executable projection the two-law branch, beta_EW = N_c + 1) plus the pixel-provenance and declared-switch surfaces the lane code exposes; no other discrete revision is reachable with the repository's own executable objects at one loop

fixed_adapters.v_over_E_star_formula: exp(-2 pi / (beta_EW alpha_U)) / sqrt(P), with alpha_U from the pixel-residual solve of the entry's own chain; consistency against the certificate value 2.0198114150099223e-17 is checked and reported at the baseline before any revision entry is read

sweep_driver: code/particles/calibration/ew_repair_sweep.py (to be added; reuses build_paper_d10, the source-pair eta formula, and strict_branch_two_law_evaluation; no forked physics)
